Hero.headlinePart1: Direct Basmati Rice & Himalayan Pink Salt,
Hero.subtitle: Indus Valley Foods is a Karachi-based direct exporter supplying Sortex-cleaned Super Kernel Basmati rice and pure Himalayan pink salt to importers worldwide — including the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Europe, Africa, and beyond — on flexible FOB and CIF terms.

Products.heading: Two Commodities. Export-Grade Specification.
Products.subtitle: Every shipment is Sortex-cleaned, moisture-controlled, and packed to your exact specification before it leaves Karachi Port.
Products.riceLede: Sortex-cleaned Basmati and IRRI Non-Basmati long grain, milled to strict export specification for global food procurement teams worldwide.
Products.saltLede: Authentic, hand-mined Himalayan pink salt, pure and unrefined, supplied as fine powder, coarse granules, or lumps.
Products.packagingHeading: Packaging Options — Applies to Both Products
Products.packagingMaterialsValue: PP Bags, Jute Bags, Non-Woven / Cotton Bags
Products.packagingLabelValue: Custom brand printing available on request

SpecMatrix.heading: Rice Grain Specification Matrix
SpecMatrix.subtitle: A scannable reference across our full Basmati and Non-Basmati range — exact figures shared and reconfirmed on every quotation.
SpecMatrix.footnote: Figures represent our standard export specification. Broken % is adjustable per buyer requirement and confirmed on the pre-shipment sample.

About.heading: A Direct Line from Karachi to Your Warehouse
About.paragraph1: Indus Valley Foods was founded to connect Pakistan's rice mills and salt mines directly with buyers abroad — without layers of brokers in between. We work with Super Kernel Basmati, IRRI-9 Non-Basmati, and Himalayan pink salt, sourced from Karachi and the Salt Range, and shipped on terms that make sense for both sides of the trade.
About.paragraph2: As a founder-led export business, every buyer gets direct access to {owner} — no call centers, no account managers passing your inquiry along. Just a straight line to the person closing your deal.
About.pillar1Detail: Rice and Himalayan pink salt sourced directly from Karachi-based mills and the Salt Range, keeping the supply chain short and quality traceable.
About.pillar2Detail: Run personally by {owner} — every inquiry, sample, and shipment is handled directly, with no middlemen between you and the source.
About.pillar3Detail: Focused on transparent pricing, sample-first verification, and consistent quality — the fundamentals of a trade relationship worth repeating.

Markets.subtitle: Container shipping lanes from Karachi Port reach every major region worldwide — with FOB and CIF terms available for each destination.
Markets.region1Countries: UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain

Logistics.heading: Karachi Port to the World
Logistics.subtitle: One origin, worldwide reach — direct FOB and CIF shipping lanes from Karachi's KICT / PICT terminals to every major import hub.
Logistics.process1Detail: Every batch is measured against its declared AGL before packing, with results shared on request.
Logistics.process2Detail: Sortex-style optical sorting removes discolored and foreign grains prior to final packing.
Logistics.process3Detail: Containers are loaded at Karachi Port terminals for direct FOB or CIF dispatch worldwide.

Trust.heading: Enterprise-Grade Compliance
Trust.item1Body: Optimized FOB and CIF timelines shipped straight from Karachi Port to any global destination.
Trust.item2Body: Strict moisture and sorting checks on every batch before it is approved for packing.
Trust.item3Body: Custom branding, retail pouches, or heavy-duty bulk bags built around your market.
Trust.item4Body: Expedited global dispatch via DHL and FedEx, at no cost before you commit.

FAQ.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ) for rice and pink salt export?
FAQ.a1: Our standard minimum order quantity is one container (approximately 20-25 metric tons). Smaller trial quantities can be discussed for first-time buyers.
FAQ.q2: Do you provide free samples before a bulk order?
FAQ.a2: Yes. We ship free physical samples via DHL or FedEx so buyers can verify quality before committing to a bulk order.
FAQ.q3: What shipping terms do you offer — FOB or CIF?
FAQ.a3: We offer both FOB (Karachi Port) and CIF to any global port. We ship worldwide, with particular experience across the UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Europe, and Africa.
FAQ.q4: What payment methods do you accept for export orders?
FAQ.a4: We accept a confirmed irrevocable Letter of Credit (L/C at sight) or advance Telegraphic Transfer (T/T) through secure international banking channels.
FAQ.q5: Which rice varieties do you export from Pakistan?
FAQ.a5: We export Super Kernel Basmati, 1121 Basmati (White, Sella, and Steam), and IRRI-9 / IRRI-6 long grain rice, all Sortex-cleaned and moisture-controlled to export specification.
FAQ.q6: What quality standard is your Himalayan pink salt supplied to?
FAQ.a6: Our Himalayan pink salt is hand-mined and supplied to a 98-99% NaCl purity standard, in fine powder, coarse granule, or lump form, ready for buyer-side quality verification via free sample.
